data.title: Bitcoin Options Show Decline in Implied Volatility Amid Market Adjustments
data.description:
Bitcoin's price has been on the rise, yet the implied volatility (IV) of major-term options is decreasing. According to Odaily, this trend is accompanied by a noticeable positive skew. The primary reason for these developments is the easing of military tensions between the U.S. and Iran, which has reduced market concerns over war risks, leading to a significant drop in the price of put options.

Trading volumes in both order books and block trades are relatively balanced, with most transactions focusing on the current and following months. The market is readjusting its position layouts, and there is a growing consensus among major participants regarding future market trends. The expectation of low volatility is becoming the mainstream outlook.

data.title: Visa, Stripe, and Zodia Custody Join Tempo Blockchain as Validators
data.description: Visa, Stripe, and Zodia Custody, a subsidiary of Standard Chartered Bank, have become validators on the Tempo blockchain. According to Odaily, these entities are now responsible for running the infrastructure that validates, orders, and finalizes transactions on the chain. Tempo recently launched on the mainnet and introduced a proxy payment protocol designed to facilitate transactions through software agents.

data.title: Open-Source Polymarket Bot Targets Non-Sports Markets
data.description: Sterling Crispin has released an open-source bot for Polymarket, designed to automatically purchase 'No' positions in non-sports markets. According to NS3.AI, Polymarket data indicates that 73.3% of resolved markets conclude with a 'No' outcome. Crispin noted that for the strategy to be effective over the long term, entry prices must be below $0.73, with the bot's maximum threshold set at $0.65.

data.title: Federal Reserve Chair nominee Warsh will testify next week, and his nomination is expected to be approved.
data.description: According to Fox Business, Federal Reserve Chair nominee Peter Warsh has cleared hurdles preventing his confirmation. Senator Sceott stated that Warsh's hearings will take place next week, and his nomination is expected to be approved. (Jinshi)

data.title: Citi Group Reports Q1 2026 Revenue of $24.6 Billion, Exceeding Expectations
data.description: Citi Group has announced its financial results for the first quarter of 2026, reporting a revenue of $24.6 billion. According to Jin10, this marks an increase from the $21.6 billion recorded in the same period last year. The reported revenue also surpassed market expectations, which had anticipated $23.358 billion for the quarter. This performance highlights Citi Group's continued growth and resilience in the financial sector.

data.title: Paxos Labs raises $12 million, led by Blockchain Capital.
data.description: Paxos Labs has spun off from stablecoin issuer Paxos and raised $12 million in funding, led by Blockchain Capital, with participation from Robot Ventures, family office Maelstrom, and DeFi developer Uniswap Labs. Paxos Labs co-founder Bhaumik Kotecha declined to disclose the valuation of the round. Paxos CEO Chad Cascarilla is also the CEO of Paxos Labs. Paxos Labs will primarily provide services to large enterprises, enabling them to create and manage their own stablecoins. (Fortune)

data.title: Nearly 400 XAUt were withdrawn from the Gate hot wallet, worth approximately $1,899,100.
data.description: According to on-chain monitoring data, 399.999777 XAUt (approximately US$1,899,100) were transferred out of the Gate hot wallet.

data.title: Visa, Stripe, and Zodia Custody join Tempo blockchain validators.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reports that Visa, Stripe, and Zodia Custody (a subsidiary of Standard Chartered Bank) have become validators on the Tempo blockchain, responsible for running the infrastructure for validating, ordering, and finally confirming on-chain transactions. Tempo recently launched its mainnet and also introduced a proxy payment protocol designed to enable transactions through software proxies. (TheBlock)

data.title: Significant Movement of Binance Coin Observed in Recent Days
data.description: On April 14, a notable movement of Binance Coin (BNB) was detected. According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, over the past three days, 15 newly created wallets have withdrawn a total of 138.26 million BNB from a centralized exchange (CEX). This activity highlights a significant shift in the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: BTQ Technologies and Daou Data Collaborate on Post-Quantum Security for South Korea
data.description: BTQ Technologies, a specialist in quantum-resistant cryptography, has announced a strategic partnership with South Korean IT and payment infrastructure company Daou Data. According to Odaily, the collaboration aims to introduce a hardware-based post-quantum security architecture to South Korea's electronic payment systems. This initiative will incorporate South Korea's post-quantum cryptography (K-PQC) and hardware trust architecture to enhance the security of key generation, encryption processing, and key management. The move is designed to address potential threats posed by quantum computing, including 'collect now, decrypt later' attack models.

data.title: The suspected controller of Binance Life withdrew 50.5 million Binance Life tokens from Binance through six wallets 10 minutes ago.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Yu Jin, 10 minutes ago, the suspected controllers of Binance Life withdrew another 50.5 million Binance Life tokens (US$16.08 million) from Binance to the blockchain through 6 wallets. Currently, the suspected control addresses of Binance Life hold 197 million Binance Life tokens on the blockchain (19.7% of the total supply, worth US$62.58 million).

data.title: UK Chancellor Criticizes U.S. President Trump Over Middle East Conflict Impact
data.description: UK Chancellor of the Exchequer Rachel Reeves has criticized U.S. President Donald Trump for the negative impact his Middle East conflict has had on the global economy. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting Reeves' accusation that Trump engaged in the conflict without a clear exit strategy. The Chancellor's remarks underscore growing international concern over the economic repercussions of the ongoing situation.

data.title: BlackRock transferred approximately 884 BTC and 604 ETH to Coinbase Prime.
data.description: According to Arkham's monitoring, BlackRock transferred 604.044 ETH, worth $1.44 million, to a Coinbase Prime address through its Ethereum exchange-traded fund ETHA one hour ago; and transferred 884.142 BTC, worth $65.95 million, to the same address through its Bitcoin exchange-traded fund IBIT.

data.title: BTQ, a Bitcoin quantum-resistant organization, is collaborating with Daou Data to advance quantum-resistant security for South Korea's payment system.
data.description: BTQ Technologies (BTQ), a specialist in quantum-resistant cryptography for Bitcoin, announced a strategic partnership with Daou Data, a South Korean IT and payment infrastructure company. The partnership aims to introduce a hardware-based post-quantum security architecture to South Korea's electronic payment system. By adopting Korean Post-Quantum Cryptography (K-PQC) and a hardware trust architecture, the partnership seeks to enhance the security of key generation, encryption processing, and key management to address potential threats posed by quantum computing, including "collect first, decrypt later" attack patterns. (Prnewswire)

data.title: UK 10-Year Bond Yield Reaches Highest Level Since 2008
data.description: On April 14, the yield on the United Kingdom's 10-year government bonds reached its highest point since 2008. According to BlockBeats, this development marks a significant milestone in the financial markets, reflecting broader economic trends and investor sentiment. The increase in yield is indicative of changing dynamics in the bond market, influenced by various factors including inflation expectations and monetary policy adjustments. This rise in yield is closely watched by investors and analysts as it may impact borrowing costs and economic growth.

data.title: Hyperliquid Founder Responds to Colossus Article
data.description: Hyperliquid founder Jeff recently addressed a report by Colossus on the X platform. According to Odaily, Jeff stated that the article was the result of several months of in-depth research and writing on Hyperliquid. He quoted Albert Einstein, saying, "If you can't explain it simply, you don't understand it well enough," and praised the author's deep understanding of Hyperliquid. Jeff noted that when asked about Hyperliquid's concept of "housing all of finance," he proudly recommends this research article, which reflects Hyperliquid's commitment to caution and craftsmanship.

data.title: Bitcoin's Critical Support Levels: Key to Sustaining Upward Momentum
data.description: Bitcoin must maintain its position within the $73,518–$73,764 range to continue its upward trajectory toward $77,000. According to NS3.AI, Bitcoin recently surpassed the $71,500 mark and may revisit this level if the current support fails to hold.

data.title: Rakuten Wallet Integrates XRP for Payments in Japan
data.description: Rakuten Wallet has introduced XRP as a new payment option for its users in Japan. According to NS3.AI, this addition allows users to utilize their loyalty points to purchase XRP, which can then be spent at various affiliated merchants throughout the country. This move is expected to enhance the flexibility and utility of digital currency transactions for Rakuten Wallet users.

data.title: Bitcoin Poised for Significant Market Breakthrough, Says 10x Research
data.description:
Bitcoin is on the verge of a significant market breakthrough, according to a market analysis by 10x Research on the X platform. According to Odaily, the internal trend model of 10x Research has already detected this shift, with current market sentiment, positions, and capital flow data confirming changes in market structure.

While there is widespread concern about the potential threat of quantum computing to the security of crypto assets, this risk is not expected to materialize until 2030 to 2035. Currently, technical indicators have shifted to a constructive range, with multiple Bitcoin trading signals indicating high-probability opportunities, suggesting that short-term upward momentum is building.

However, 10x Research emphasizes that the more critical question is whether this market movement will evolve into a new bull market and challenge historical highs.

data.title: Mixed Martial Arts Firm Seeks Government Contracts for Combat Training
data.description: A mixed martial arts company associated with Donald Trump Jr. is aiming to secure government contracts to provide combat training to military and police forces. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the company's strategy to leverage its expertise in fighting techniques to enhance the capabilities of security personnel. The firm believes its specialized training can offer significant advantages in real-world scenarios, potentially improving the effectiveness of military and law enforcement operations. The move comes as security agencies increasingly seek innovative methods to prepare their personnel for diverse challenges. The company's initiative reflects a growing trend of private enterprises collaborating with government bodies to enhance national security measures.
